inputs.label: Transfer Amount
inputs.businessContext: The principal amount to be transferred in US dollars.

inputs.label: Sender's Flat Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fixed fee charged by the sending bank.

inputs.label: Sender's Percentage Fee
inputs.businessContext: Percentage fee charged by the sending bank on the transfer amount.

inputs.label: Intermediary Bank Flat Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fixed fee charged by any intermediary bank, typically for international transfers.

inputs.label: Receiver's Flat Fee
inputs.businessContext: Fixed fee charged by the receiving bank.

inputs.label: International Transfer
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 if the transfer is international (involves intermediary/receiver fees), 0 for domestic.
